prompt: Recreate this circular flavor-badge logo, keeping it almost identical: the navy and gold Monte-Carlo art-deco medallion, gold sunburst, gold beaded border, the gold wordmark 'MONACO MANGO TRUFFLE', and the glossy whole mango with a leaf plus two mango slices at the bottom. The ONLY change: SIMPLIFY and calm it down — the swirling golden mango-juice splash currently wraps busily all the way around the medallion and is too much. Greatly reduce that splash to just a small, tasteful golden accent right beneath the mango and slices (a few elegant droplets / a subtle pool), leaving the sides and upper medallion clean. Keep the mango and two slices as the hero. More negative space, refined and premium, less busy. No chocolate or truffles. Pure solid white background, centered contained badge with margin.
